## Public Repo Hygiene

- [ ] No `.env.local`, secrets, tokens, or credentials are included.
- [ ] No raw source screenshots or copied private content are included.
- [ ] Any public assets are reviewed and intentionally committed.
- [ ] Any business details in docs are approved for a public portfolio repo.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
